name: Impact Fitness Systems
description:
This rental entitles you to 60 minutes of pickleball court time. The court can host up to 4 people and equipment is provided upon request. If you prefer to bring your favorite paddle, go for it!

We also ask to please refrain from wearing black-soled shoes on our sport court flooring.
